heading: Export your gold
intro: Each country applies its own rules for reporting, taxation, and VAT on investment gold. Here's an overview of the main markets we cover.

switzerland.name: Switzerland
switzerland.keyPoint: VAT exemption for investment gold (Art. 23 para. 12 VAT Act)

france.name: France
france.keyPoint: 11.5% flat tax on resale, unless proof of purchase is retained

germany.name: Germany
germany.keyPoint: Tax-free gain after a one-year holding period (§23 EStG)

italy.name: Italy
italy.keyPoint: VAT-exempt on investment gold, stricter reporting regime

usa.name: United States
usa.keyPoint: No federal VAT; capital gains tax varies by state
